nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=42 beats='twilight, as the garden turns gold over the warm garden pond at night; high above, Pip, the smallest lightning bug, wakes up in his cozy leaf hammock and rubs her eyes; tonight is her very first night to shine all by herself'>>

choices.label: Peek out at the warm garden pond at night.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=40 beats='wise old Frog rises slowly and smiles at Pip; wise old Frog whispers that the warm garden pond at night is waiting for her little light; Pip feels fluttery and shy in her tummy, so she squeezes her wings tight and gets ready to be brave'>>

choices.label: Take a big, brave breath.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Pip floats to his own lily pad perch and wonders how to start shining; she could hide behind the shady fern first, or do a quick wing flutter to wake up her sparkle, or scoot down to peek at the pond below'>>

choices.label: Hide behind the shady fern.
Do a quick wing flutter.
Scoot down to peek at the pond below.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Pip tucks herself behind the shady fern so only the very tip of her glow peeks out; the shady fern is soft and cozy, but his own lily pad perch stays dark and empty; she can snuggle deeper into the shady fern or peek out one tiny sparkle'>>

choices.label: Snuggle deeper into the shady fern.
Peek out one tiny sparkle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='deep in the shady fern Pip rests a little while and wise old Frog hums one soft low note; the shady fern tickles her nose and she giggles a tiny giggle; the rest makes her feel a little braver, so she floats back toward his own lily pad perch to try again'>>

choices.label: Float back and try again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='one tiny sparkle slips out and drifts all the way down to the warm garden pond at night, where a snail blinks hello back up at her; Pip gasps with joy, her little light reached somebody; her glow steadies and grows a bit warmer and bolder'>>

choices.label: Let the glow grow bigger.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Pip wiggles and jiggles to wake up her sparkle, and tiny gold sparks shakes off her wings in every direction; it is very fun but very wobbly, and her light flickers like a hiccup; she can wiggle even faster or slow down and sway like a lullaby'>>

choices.label: Wiggle even faster!
Slow down and sway like a lullaby.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Pip wiggles so fast she spins in a dizzy circle and plops onto a patch of moss, giggling; her sparkle goes all fizzy like tiny bubbles; wise old Frog chuckles kindly and says gently does it, little one, so she dusts off her wings and floats back to try again'>>

choices.label: Float back and try again.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Pip sways slowly, side to side, like the reeds far below; her sparkle settles into one warm, steady glow; the swaying feels just like a lullaby and she hums along softly, calm and ready at last'>>

choices.label: Glide to his own lily pad perch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Pip scoots down the warm garden pond at night to peek at the pond below, but whoops, the warm garden pond at night is slippery tonight and she slides down, down, down to just above the lily pads; she can grab a a floating lily pad and climb right back up, or take a little peek around from down low'>>

choices.label: Climb the a floating lily pad back up.
Take a peek from down low.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='from down low Pip sees small burrows with soft glowing lanterns, and rabbits in the burrow peeking up, waiting for the smallest lightning bug; her heart glows warm as toast; rabbits in the burrow need her light tonight, so she floats up and up toward his own lily pad perch'>>

choices.label: Float up to his own lily pad perch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='back at his own lily pad perch, the warm garden pond at night finally feels just right, soft and dark and quiet as a blanket; wise old Frog nods proudly and the whole night seems to wait; Pip can try one tiny practice sparkle first, or hold onto a a floating lily pad and shine all at once'>>

choices.label: Try one tiny practice sparkle.
Hold a a floating lily pad and shine all at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Pip lets out one small practice sparkle and it glows steady and bright, not wobbly at all; she laughs out loud with happy surprise; her shyness floats away like a little cloud, and now she is truly ready to shine her whole light'>>

choices.label: Shine with all her light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Pip takes the biggest breath of all and shines, and her silver light spills soft and bright across the warm garden pond at night; wise old Frog beams with pride; now Pip can wink goodnight to rabbits in the burrow below, or sing a humming tune with wise old Frog, or invite the other garden lightning bugs to shine along'>>

choices.label: Wink goodnight to rabbits in the burrow.
Sing a humming tune with wise old Frog.
Invite the other garden lightning bugs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Pip twinkles a slow, gentle goodnight wink, and far below rabbits in the burrow wave from their windows and snuggle into their beds; the warm garden pond at night grows quiet and dreamy under her soft silver light; Pip shines calm and proud, the smallest lightning bug, right where she belongs'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Pip and wise old Frog hum a humming tune together while the warm garden pond at night rocks slow and gentle like a cradle; her light glows in time with the tune; down below, sleepy eyes close one by one; Pip sings the whole world to sleep and is not one bit shy anymore'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='Pip calls out softly and one by one the other garden lightning bugs pop out beside her, blinking hello until the warm garden pond at night is full of friendly lights; shining is easy with friends all around; Pip glows happiest of all, the smallest lightning bug who lit up the whole night'>>
